examples: This looks like the handiwork of an arsonist.
Once a burning firelighter is placed against a tyre, it takes a few minutes for a car to ignite, giving the arsonist plenty of time to escape.
The arsonist set the suitcase on the closed trunk and unlatched the fasteners on the suitcase.
As long as he paid, the Arsonist didn't care what the man was like.
